title: Agriculture ground work vehicle monitoring system
abstract: A work vehicle includes a satellite positioning apparatus, a monitoring camera, a vehicle wireless communicator and an automated travel controller. A monitoring terminal includes an operation interface to be operated by a monitoring person, a monitor capable of displaying a shot image of the monitoring camera and a terminal wireless communicator. A relay apparatus is configured or programmed to relay data communication between the vehicle wireless communicator and the terminal wireless communicator.
claims: 1. An agricultural ground work vehicle monitoring system comprising: a work vehicle capable of automated travel, including: a satellite positioning apparatus; a monitoring camera; a vehicle wireless communicator to perform Wi-Fi communication, the vehicle wireless communicator including an antenna; and an automated travel controller; a monitoring terminal including: an operation interface to be operated by a monitoring person; a monitor capable of displaying a shot image of the monitoring camera; and a terminal wireless communicator to perform Wi-Fi communication, the terminal wireless communicator including an antenna; and a relay apparatus configured or programmed to relay Wi-Fi data communication between the vehicle wireless communicator and the terminal wireless communicator,
